channel.title: Jeeves on Edd Mann
channel.description: Recent content in Jeeves on Edd Mann

item.title: Weeknotes: Harness Engineering, PWAKit Documentation, and Marathon Reality Checks
item.description: A bit of everything this week. PWAKit docs, rethinking how agents get isolated workspaces, pruning overstuffed config files, and Jeeves diplomatically telling me I’m not marathon-ready.

item.title: Weeknotes: Week One with a Newborn and an AI Butler
item.description: I’ve been AFK from the computer the last couple of weeks due to the birth of my new baby. This weeknotes is different - less building at the computer, more living with what was already built.
